span.p: 客户侧 H5 / 小程序

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 67) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
apps/admin-web
Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite
Pinia / Vue Router / Element Plus
功能: 登录 会话 RBAC 菜单 管理员 角色 权限 客户 消息模板 站内信

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 67) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
apps/customer-miniapp
uni-app + Vue 3 + TypeScript
页面: 首页 手机号登录 个人资料 编辑资料
目标: H5 / 微信小程序

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 67) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
shared/api/gateway.ts
admin-identity / customer-account / message-center 前缀拼接

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 67) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
edge-proxy Caddy
admin.example.com -> admin-web
app.example.com -> customer-miniapp
api.example.com -> gateway
Cloudflare DNS-01 TLS

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Explore.Gateway.Api
ASP.NET Core + YARP

CorrelationId / Serilog / health

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ReverseProxy Routes
/admin-identity/** -> AdminIdentityService
/customer-account/** -> CustomerAccountService
/message-center/** -> MessageCenterService
PathRemovePrefix
